paths.reason: Source directive defining required intervention order and non-goals.
Canonical acceptance criteria and boundaries for this nested run.
Primary evidence artifact for pause, resume, and abort transitions.
Proof-bundle index reference to intervention evidence path.
Ratified: appendFeatureDeliveryInterventionRunLog emits OpenInference JSONL rows so pause-resume-abort-evidence.json can cite trace_id:span_id per nested spec and US-1 acceptance group.
Ratified: wires pause/resume/abort CLI commands to run-log append for feature-delivery task state files.
Ratified: regression coverage for intervention run-log emission on tess pause.

non_goals: Do not substitute for the end-to-end proof-bundle nested run.
Do not start Phase 5 M1 backlog delivery.
Do not execute intervention CLI steps outside the live plan-stage boundary.
Do not modify any src/memory/features/us-1-dogfood-phase-4-exit/ path except pause-resume-abort-evidence.json and phase-4-proof-bundle.md.
required_artifacts: Plan-stage artifacts: plan.md, adr-draft.md, touch-set.json, and updated handoff.md.
Implement-stage intervention evidence with pause/resume/abort state diffs and run-log event-id citations.
Review artifact verifying all acceptance criteria and non-goal compliance.
Feature delivery report and timestamped ship-stage copy under src/inbox/out/.
